mapper.insert: /* oms-master-commonCodeBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertErpCommonCodeIntfInfo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_COM_HD ( OWKEY , COMHDKEY , INSERTSYSTM , COMHDNM , WMSIFYN , TMSIFYN , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT DISTINCT #{owkey} , COMHDKEY , #{insertsystm} , COMHDNM , 'Y' , 'Y' , 'N' , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_EAI_COMCD_BATCH WHERE TRN_ID = #{trnId} ON CONFLICT (OWKEY, COMHDKEY, INSERTSYSTM) DO UPDATE SET COMHDNM = EXCLUDED.COMHDNM , UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY

/* oms-master-commonCodeBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertErpDetailCommonCodeIntfInfo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_COM_DT ( OWKEY , COMHDKEY , COMDTKEY , INSERTSYSTM , LAKEY , COMDTNM , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} , COMHDKEY , COMDTKEY , #{insertsystm} , 'KOR' , COMDTNM , 'N' , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_EAI_COMCD_BATCH WHERE TRN_ID = #{trnId} ON CONFLICT (OWKEY, COMHDKEY, INSERTSYSTM, COMDTKEY, LAKEY) DO UPDATE SET COMDTNM = EXCLUDED.COMDTNM , UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY

/* oms-master-commonCodeBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertMalCommonCodeIntfInfo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_COM_HD ( OWKEY , COMHDKEY , INSERTSYSTM , COMHDNM , UPRCOMHDKEY , WMSIFYN , TMSIFYN , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} , COMHDKEY , #{insertsystm} , COMHDNM , UPRCOMHDKEY , 'Y' , 'Y' , HDDELYN , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_COM WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId} GROUP BY OWKEY, COMHDKEY, INSERTSYSTM, COMHDNM, UPRCOMHDKEY, HDDELYN ON CONFLICT (OWKEY, COMHDKEY, INSERTSYSTM) DO UPDATE SET COMHDNM = EXCLUDED.COMHDNM , UPRCOMHDKEY = EXCLUDED.UPRCOMHDKEY , DELYN = EXCLUDED.DELYN , UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY

/* oms-master-commonCodeBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertMalDetailCommonCodeIntfInfo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_COM_DT ( OWKEY , COMHDKEY , COMDTKEY , INSERTSYSTM , LAKEY , COMDTNM , UPRCOMDTKEY , DTKEYORD , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} , COMHDKEY , COMDTKEY , #{insertsystm} , 'KOR' , COMDTNM , UPRCOMDTKEY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY COMHDKEY ORDER BY COMDTKEY) , DTDELYN , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_COM WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId} GROUP BY OWKEY, COMHDKEY, COMDTKEY, INSERTSYSTM, COMDTNM, UPRCOMDTKEY, DTDELYN ON CONFLICT (OWKEY, COMHDKEY, INSERTSYSTM, COMDTKEY, LAKEY) DO UPDATE SET COMDTNM = EXCLUDED.COMDTNM , UPRCOMDTKEY = EXCLUDED.UPRCOMDTKEY , DTKEYORD = EXCLUDED.DTKEYORD , DELYN = EXCLUDED.DELYN , UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY

/* oms-master-commonCodeBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertOrderMstGradeIfNotExists */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_GRADE ( OWKEY , CTKEY , OLNICDIV , NEEDDAYS , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT DT.OWKEY , CT.CTKEY , DT.COMDTKEY , 0 , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_MST_COM_DT DT CROSS JOIN TORDER_MST_CT CT LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_GRADE GR ON DT.OWKEY = GR.OWKEY AND DT.COMDTKEY = GR.OLNICDIV AND CT.CTKEY = GR.CTKEY WHERE DT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND DT.COMHDKEY = 'CD_00577' AND CT.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND GR.OLNICDIV IS NULL AND DT.DELYN='N'

/* oms-master-commonCodeBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertErpCommonCodeCtgIntfInfo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_CTG ( CTGKEY , CTGLV , OWKEY , CTGNM , UPPERCTGKEY , IFYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT COMDTKEY AS CTGKEY , CASE WHEN LENGTH(COMDTKEY) = 4 THEN '3' WHEN LENGTH(COMDTKEY) = 2 THEN '2' WHEN LENGTH(COMDTKEY) = 1 THEN '1' END AS CTGLV , #{owkey} , COMDTNM AS CTGNM , CASE WHEN LENGTH(COMDTKEY) = 4 THEN SUBSTR(COMDTKEY, 1, 2) WHEN LENGTH(COMDTKEY) = 2 THEN SUBSTR(COMDTKEY, 1, 1) WHEN LENGTH(COMDTKEY) = 1 THEN NULL END AS UPPERCTGKEY , 'Y' , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_EAI_COMCD_BATCH WHERE COMHDKEY IN ('DIV_MIN','DIV_MID', 'DIV_MAX') AND TRN_ID = #{trnId} ON CONFLICT (OWKEY, CTGKEY) DO UPDATE SET CTGLV = EXCLUDED.CTGLV , UPPERCTGKEY = EXCLUDED.UPPERCTGKEY , CTGNM = EXCLUDED.CTGNM , UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY
